description: Recto, with address on verso: Letter in Arabic script addressed to al-muʿallim Yehuda KR[...]. Verso and margins of recto: Business letter in Judaeo-Arabic, involving the sale of a house. Dating: Probably Mamluk-era. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
